parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
  COALESCE(AVG(total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value,
  MAX(total_amount) AS max_order
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND created_at < date_trunc('day', NOW());

INSERT INTO reports (title, type, content, email_status, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.report_title }}',
  '{{ $json.report_type }}',
  '{{ $json.report_content }}',
  '{{ $json.email_status }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO workflow_logs (workflow_name, status, message)
VALUES (
  'daily_report',
  'success',
  'Da tao bao cao, xuat file CSV va gui email thanh cong'
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO workflow_logs (workflow_name, status, message)
VALUES (
  'daily_report',
  'success',
  'Workflow chay thanh cong nhung khong co don hang, da gui email thong bao no-data'
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  order_code,
  total_amount,
  status,
  created_at
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND created_at < date_trunc('day', NOW())
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

parameters.jsCode:
const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('vi-VN'); const emailHTML = `

⚠️ DAILY REPORT - NO ORDERS

Ngày báo cáo: ${today}

🧾 Tổng đơn: 0

💰 Doanh thu: 0 VND

📌 Trạng thái: Không có đơn hàng trong kỳ báo cáo.

Hệ thống vẫn ghi nhận báo cáo để quản lý biết workflow đã chạy thành công.

⚙️ Generated automatically by DashAuto Automation System

`; return [ { json: { total_orders: 0, total_revenue: 0, email_subject: '⚠️ Daily Report - Không có đơn hàng', email_body: emailHTML, // 🔥 QUAN TRỌNG: phân biệt rõ report_title: '⚠️ Bao cao hang ngay - Khong co don', report_type: 'daily_no_data', report_content: 'Khong co don hang | Tong don: 0 | Doanh thu: 0 VND', email_status: 'success', }, }, ];
